title: Pack dry-run still ships the built Orca entrypoints
input: Run `npm pack --json --dry-run` after ensuring the build output exists, then verify the tarball manifest still includes the shipped Orca bin and dist index entrypoints.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; npm pack --json --dry-run 2>/dev/null | tr -cd "\11\12\15\40-\176"'
